event: Arena Colosseum / Colosseum Hackathon (official judge list)
note_for_super_agent: All 34 judges now loaded. Use 'superteam_association' or 'region_superteam' for regional filtering. Most feedback is private/platform-based. Public drops noted where found. Core criteria still apply: traction/metrics, payment proof, 1-liner clarity, demo, moat, regulatory slide.

judges.name: Billy | attn.markets
judges.affiliation: BUILDING @attndotmarkets - CREDIT LINE AGAINST ONCHAIN REVENUES @COLOSSEUM WINNER (Undefined Track) prev: Flashbots research grantee, DeFi research, HFT
judges.profile_summary: Former Colosseum winner + DeFi/HFT/Flashbots background. Strong on-chain revenue & credit primitives lens. Rewards real traction and proven DeFi mechanics.

judges.name: Prism
judges.affiliation: Head of Product & BD @AxiomExchange | Member @SuperteamDE Vibecoding shit for fun
judges.profile_summary: Product & BD focused. Values strong UX, go-to-market, and fun/vibe execution in consumer or infra apps.

judges.name: Rodion
judges.affiliation: Privacy freak, building @loyal_hq
judges.profile_summary: Privacy infrastructure builder. Judges heavily for data privacy, security, and technical depth.

judges.affiliation: A W a day keeps the L's away. Prev @DriftProtocol
judges.profile_summary: DeFi protocol veteran (Drift). Focuses on execution velocity and real trading/derivatives experience.

judges.profile_summary: Internal Arena engineer. Extremely technical; judges for code quality, Solana-native implementation, and hackathon feasibility.
